GET.name: Obtain information about all Nobel Prizes or search for a specific set of Nobel Prizes. Note that not all information about the Laureates are provided in the output, as a request of making this endpoints response lighter. Call the laureates endpoint for full information.

GET.name: Obtain information about one specific Nobel Prize. Used as unique identifier for links.
Obtain information about Nobel Prize Laureates (persons and organizations) and their Nobel Prize(s), or search for a set of Laureates. Returns full information about the Laureates and Prizes.
